expectations.text: AGENTS.md is created at the monorepo root
expectations.evidence: No AGENTS.md file exists in outputs/. The outputs directory contains only knowledge/ and packages/ subdirectories. No AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md at any level.

expectations.text: Root CLAUDE.md is a symlink to AGENTS.md
expectations.evidence: /tmp/eval-monorepo-baseline/CLAUDE.md does not exist. `ls -la /tmp/eval-monorepo-baseline/` shows only: knowledge/, package.json, packages/, README.md — no CLAUDE.md symlink.
outputs/packages/api/ contains only a knowledge/ subdirectory. No AGENTS.md present.

expectations.text: packages/api/CLAUDE.md is a symlink to packages/api/AGENTS.md
expectations.evidence: /tmp/eval-monorepo-baseline/packages/api/CLAUDE.md does not exist. The api directory contains only: knowledge/, package.json, src/.

expectations.text: Root AGENTS.md references or links to per-package AGENTS.md files
expectations.evidence: No AGENTS.md exists at any location in outputs/ or /tmp/eval-monorepo-baseline/. Cannot satisfy this expectation.

expectations.text: packages/api/knowledge/ is created with at least one doc
expectations.evidence: outputs/packages/api/knowledge/overview.md exists (827 chars) with genuine content: GraphQL API overview, auth (JWT), rate limiting, and dependency notes on @platform/shared.

expectations.text: Root AGENTS.md covers cross-package concerns; api AGENTS.md focuses on api-specific content
expectations.evidence: No AGENTS.md files were created anywhere. The executor created knowledge/ docs but none of these are AGENTS.md files.

claims.claim: The executor created knowledge/ docs capturing monorepo structure
claims.evidence: outputs/knowledge/overview.md covers package structure, workspace config, cross-package dependency rules. outputs/knowledge/shared-types.md documents User and Order interfaces from @platform/shared. Both are substantive.

claims.claim: The executor created api-specific knowledge docs
claims.evidence: outputs/packages/api/knowledge/overview.md covers GraphQL role, auth (JWT), rate limits, and dep on @platform/shared. Focused and accurate.

claims.claim: The executor created AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md files as required by the eval
claims.evidence: No AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md files found anywhere in outputs/ or /tmp/eval-monorepo-baseline/. The executor created knowledge/ docs instead, missing the primary deliverable entirely.

suggestions.assertion: packages/api/knowledge/ is created with at least one doc
suggestions.reason: This assertion passes even though the run failed every other expectation. A run that creates knowledge/ docs but no AGENTS.md scores 1/7 — this may mislead. Consider gating this expectation on AGENTS.md existing, or whether knowledge/ creation alone deserves credit when the main harness artifact is absent.

No assertion checks the content of AGENTS.md for required sections (e.g., knowledge/ index, agent instructions). An AGENTS.md that is empty or minimal would currently pass expectations 1, 3, 5, and 7.
No assertion checks that the symlinks resolve correctly (CLAUDE.md -> AGENTS.md points to an existing file). A broken symlink would satisfy a symlink-existence check but not be functional.

eval_feedback.overall: The run produced good knowledge/ docs but completely missed the primary deliverable: AGENTS.md files and CLAUDE.md symlinks. The single passing expectation (packages/api/knowledge/ exists) is a weak signal given the overall failure. Assertions 1-5 and 7 all fail cleanly. Eval logic is sound but could add content checks for AGENTS.md.
